mapper.insert:
insert into hot_snapshot(snapshot_time, bvid, title, url, cover_url, author, tname, partition_tag, pubdate, description, `rank`, view_count, like_count, coin_count, favorite_count, share_count, danmaku_count, reply_count, hot_score) values
(#{item.snapshotTime}, #{item.bvid}, #{item.title}, #{item.url}, #{item.coverUrl}, #{item.author}, #{item.tname}, #{item.partitionTag}, #{item.pubdate}, #{item.description}, #{item.rank}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.likeCount}, #{item.coinCount}, #{item.favoriteCount}, #{item.shareCount}, #{item.danmakuCount}, #{item.replyCount}, #{item.hotScore})
on duplicate key update snapshot_time = values(snapshot_time), title = values(title), url = values(url), cover_url = values(cover_url), author = values(author), tname = values(tname), partition_tag = values(partition_tag), pubdate = values(pubdate), description = values(description), `rank` = values(`rank`), view_count = values(view_count), like_count = values(like_count), coin_count = values(coin_count), favorite_count = values(favorite_count), share_count = values(share_count), danmaku_count = values(danmaku_count), reply_count = values(reply_count), hot_score = values(hot_score)
mapper.select: select id, snapshot_time, bvid, title, url, cover_url, author, tname, partition_tag, pubdate, description, `rank`, view_count, like_count, coin_count, favorite_count, share_count, danmaku_count, reply_count, hot_score, created_at from hot_snapshot where snapshot_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} order by snapshot_time desc, `rank` asc
